basic_details.job_title: NIT Calicut Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The National Institute of Technology Calicut (NIT Calicut) has officially announced the Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening under Advertisement No. JRF/ANRF/ECRG/2025/002595/ENS. Candidates who are up to 28 years of age and hold a Master's Degree in Mechanical Engineering or Production Engineering with a minimum of 60% marks (or equivalent CGPA) and a valid GATE/ NET score are eligible to apply through Email on or before 30 July 2026. Direct links to download the official notification and application details are shared below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years as on 30-07-2026. Age relaxation will be provided based on Government of India rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree in Mechanical Engineering/ Production Engineering with an aggregate minimum of 60% marks (average of all semesters) or CGPA/ CPI grading of 6.5 on a 10-point scale or equivalent, with a valid GATE/ NET score, Experience in designing and monitoring experimental setup/Numerical modelling (Desirable)
qualification.details: Master's Degree in Mechanical Engineering/ Production Engineering with an aggregate minimum of 60% marks (average of all semesters) or CGPA/ CPI grading of 6.5 on a 10-point scale or equivalent, with a valid GATE/ NET score. Desirable: Experience in designing and monitoring experimental setup/Numerical modelling.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Calicut Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Calicut Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Calicut Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Junior Research Fellow position at NIT Calicut?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Research Fellow position at NIT Calicut is 30th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's Degree in Mechanical Engineering or Production Engineering with at least 60% marks or equivalent CGPA, along with a valid GATE/NET score.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any experience required for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: Experience in designing and monitoring experimental setups or numerical modeling is desirable but not mandatory for this position.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 28 years as of 30th July 2026. Age relaxation will be provided as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 37,000 plus 20% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the Junior Research Fellow vacancy?
faq.answer: Applications should be submitted via email. Ensure all required documents are attached and the subject line is clearly mentioned.

faq.question: Q7. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by a hybrid interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article. It contains all the detailed information.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Fellow position at NIT Calicut is a contract-based role.
